item.title: 👍Kim Justice - Partners for Our Children
item.description: Kim Justice signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Partners for Our Children.

item.title: 👍💵Julie Watts - Department of Children, Youth and Families
item.description: Julie Watts signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Department of Children, Youth and Families. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Derek Harris - Community Youth Services
item.description: Derek Harris signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Community Youth Services.

item.title: 👍Mary Curry - Linked Arms/Pathways
item.description: Mary Curry signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Linked Arms/Pathways.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.description: Floor amendment(s) adopted.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 92; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 4.
